description: This video explores the origins of Decentralized Finance (DeFi), tracing its roots from Bitcoin's creation in 2009 to the launch of the Ethereum network in 2015, which introduced smart contracts and ERC-20 token standards.
topic_summary: The concept of DeFi emerged with Bitcoin in 2009, but gained momentum with Ethereum's launch in 2015, enabling smart contracts and decentralized applications [t=0:72-51.58].
